name: Rick's Buy & Sell
description_short: Rick's Buy & Sell is a pawn shop located in Shirley, NY offering collateral-based loans and buying/selling of merchandise.
description_long: Rick's Buy & Sell operates as a traditional pawn shop serving the Shirley, New York community from its location at 662 Montauk Highway. The business model centers on providing quick access to cash through collateral-based lending, where customers can pawn items of value in exchange for immediate funds. Like most pawn operations, the company also buys and sells merchandise, creating a dual revenue stream from both lending services and retail inventory. The business maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week to serve local customers seeking fast liquidity without credit checks or traditional loan application processes. Rick's Buy & Sell distinguishes itself through its physical presence in a suburban Long Island market, offering face-to-face transactions and local accessibility. The company's straightforward approach appeals to customers who need immediate cash and prefer transparent, collateral-secured transactions over credit-dependent alternatives. However, as with all pawn shops, the interest rates and terms associated with pawn loans can be considerably higher than traditional lending options, and customers risk losing their collateral if unable to repay within the agreed timeframe. This service model works best for individuals with items of value who need emergency cash quickly but should be carefully considered as a borrowing strategy given the cost structure inherent to pawn lending.
pros: Accessible local business with consistent Monday-Friday hours (9 AM-6 PM) and Saturday service
Quick cash transactions without credit checks or lengthy approval processes
Physical storefront location at 662 Montauk Highway in Shirley for in-person service
Direct phone contact available at (631) 399-1900 for customer inquiries
Buy and sell model allows customers to both pledge items and purchase merchandise
Collateral-based lending provides transparent transaction structure with tangible asset backing
cons: Pawn loans typically carry significantly higher interest rates than traditional bank loans
Risk of permanent loss of collateral if unable to repay within agreed timeframe
Limited information available online about specific terms, rates, or loan amounts offered
Website provides only Waze navigation page rather than dedicated company information site
No details disclosed regarding loan duration, redemption policies, or fee structures
best_for: Individuals with items of value who need emergency cash within hours
Borrowers with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional loans
People seeking transparent, collateral-backed lending without credit inquiries
diagnosis: Rick's Buy & Sell is best for individuals with items of value who urgently need cash and cannot access traditional lending. The critical caveat is that pawn loans carry substantially higher costs than conventional borrowing, and failure to repay results in permanent loss of pledged items—making this a last-resort option rather than a primary financing strategy.
services: Pawn loans on personal items and valuables
